title: Using Point Objects
description:
Using Point Objects

Using Point Objects

The next few sections guide you through how to create and use a Point object.

We will review the following items

	Create a new Point object
	Positioning the Point object on the screen
	Configuring properties associated with the
	 Point object
	Running the Point object and Examining the
	 results

Prior to starting the steps shown below, you should have already created a new vision sequence or selected a vision sequence to use. If you have no Vision Sequence to work with, you can create a new vision sequence by clicking on the [New Sequence] button.  You can also select a sequence which was created previously by clicking on the Sequence tree in the Vision Guide window. See Vision Sequences for details on how to create a new vision sequence or select one which was previously defined.

Step 1: Create a New Point Object

Step 2: Positioning the Point Object

Step 3: Configuring Properties for the Point Object

Step 4: Running the Point Object and Examining the Results
